[4/30 Additional Maintenance Notice]

There is another temporary maintenance currently ongoing.
Our sincere apologies for the inconvenience, Sensei.

Please note that the game will be unavailable during this time.

🗓️Maintenance Period: 4/30 (Tue) 1:13 PM – TBD (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2557321

※ Maintenance times may change based on conditions.
#BlueArchive

Our sincere apologies for the inconvenience, Sensei.

Please refer to the notice below for details on the tasks during and after today's maintenances and the compensation you deserve.

➡️Details:
